results.rendered_html:
rah cl. 1. P. ( Dhātup. xvii, 82 ) rahati (pf. rarāha &c. Gr.; inf. -rahitum See vi-√rah),
to part, separate,  MBh. i, 5199  (v.l.);
to leave, quit, abandon,  Dhātup. ;
Caus. or cl. 10. P. (xxxv, 6 ) to leave, abandon,  Kāv. ;
to cause to give up or abandon,  Bālar.  [cf. λαθ in λανθάνω.]
